channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WIPRO] Wipro to Acquire Mindsprint Pte. Ltd. for US$ 375 Million in a Strategic Deal with Olam Group
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Wipro Ltd, through its subsidiaries, has signed a definitive agreement to acquire 100% shareholding in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd. and its subsidiaries on April 5, 2026. The acquisition is part of a multi-year strategic transformation deal with Olam Group, a leading USD 50+ Billion Food and Agri-business headquartered in Singapore. The deal is expected to exceed USD 1 Billion in contract value, with a committed spend of USD 800 Million. Mindsprint, the IT services arm of Olam Group, provides technology and digital transformation services across various domains and has a global workforce of 3,200+ employees. The acquisition is subject to customary closing adjustments and anti-trust approvals under the competition laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Australia. The transaction is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.

  • Wipro to acquire 100% shareholding in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd. and its subsidiaries
  • Multi-year strategic transformation deal with Olam Group, a leading USD 50+ Billion Food and Agri-business
  • Deal expected to exceed USD 1 Billion in contract value, with a committed spend of USD 800 Million
  • Mindsprint provides technology and digital transformation services across various domains with a global workforce of 3,200+ employees
  • Subject to customary closing adjustments and anti-trust approvals under the competition laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Australia

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIPRO LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [WIPRO] Wipro Wins One of its Largest Strategic Transformation Engagements from Olam Group
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Wipro Limited has secured a multi-year strategic transformation deal with Olam Group, a leading US$ 50+ Billion food and agri-business. The 8-year engagement is expected to exceed US$ 1 Billion in contract value, with a committed spend of US$ 800 Million. As part of the engagement, Wipro will deliver end-to-end transformation services to Olam Group through a consulting-led and AI-powered approach. The acquisition of Olam's IT and digital services business, Mindsprint, will strengthen Olam Group’s core operations and support the creation of a sustainable competitive advantage.

  • Wipro secures a multi-year strategic transformation deal with Olam Group expected to exceed US$ 1 Billion in contract value
  • Wipro to acquire Olam Group’s IT and digital services business, Mindsprint, for US$ 800 Million committed spend
  • The engagement aims to strengthen Olam Group’s core operations and support the creation of a sustainable competitive advantage
  • Mindsprint brings deep domain expertise in the food and agri-business sector and strong capabilities in supply chain transformation
  • The acquisition is expected to close at quarter ending Q1 FY27 (end of June 2026)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIPRO LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [IEX*] IEX Achieves Highest Ever Traded Electricity Volume of 141 BU in FY’26, Marking 17% YoY Increase
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indian Energy Exchange (IEX) has achieved the highest ever traded electricity volume of 141 Billion Units (BU) in FY’26, marking a 17% increase year-on-year. The exchange also recorded the highest ever yearly trade of Renewable Energy Certificates (RECs) at 187.20 lakh. The power demand in the country grew by 1.1% on a year-on-year basis. The Market Clearing Price in the Day-Ahead Market (DAM) and Real-Time Market (RTM) declined by 13.7% and 16% respectively compared to FY’25.

  • IEX achieves highest ever traded electricity volume of 141 BU in FY’26, increase of 17% YoY
  • RECs trade at 187.20 lakh, highest ever yearly trade, increase of 5% YoY
  • Power demand grows by 1.1% on a year-on-year basis
  • Average DAM price at Rs 3.86/unit, lower by 13.7% YoY
  • Average RTM price at Rs 3.59/unit, lower by 16% YoY

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [AXISBANK] AXIS Bank Ltd Reports QoQ and YoY Growth in Q1 FY26
item.description:
In accordance with SEBI regulations, AXIS Bank Ltd has reported provisional figures for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The bank has shown a quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) growth of 6.3% and a year-over-year (YoY) growth of 18.4% in gross advances, which stood at ₹ 12,442 billion. Total deposits also saw an increase, with a QoQ growth of 6.0% and a YoY growth of 13.9%, amounting to ₹ 13,358 billion. The bank's Current Account, Savings Account (CASA) balances grew by 7.3% QoQ and 10.6% YoY, reaching ₹ 5,289 billion. Term deposits also saw a significant rise, with a QoQ growth of 5.1% and a YoY growth of 16.1%, amounting to ₹ 8,069 billion. The bank's quarterly average balance for total deposits stood at ₹ 12,265 billion, with a 2.4% QoQ growth and 13.1% YoY growth. The CASA quarterly average balance was ₹ 4,583 billion, with a 2.3% QoQ growth and 10.4% YoY growth. The term deposits quarterly average balance was ₹ 7,682 billion, with a 2.5% QoQ growth and 14.8% YoY growth.

  • QoQ growth of 6.3% in gross advances
  • YoY growth of 18.4% in gross advances
  • QoQ growth of 6.0% in total deposits
  • YoY growth of 13.9% in total deposits
  • 7.3% QoQ growth in CASA balances
  • 10.6% YoY growth in CASA balances
  • 5.1% QoQ growth in term deposits
  • 16.1% YoY growth in term deposits

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AXIS BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GODAVARIB] Godavari Biorefineries Achieves Record-Breaking Crushing of 2.5 Million Tonnes in Current Sugarane Season
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godavari Biorefineries Ltd has announced that it has achieved the highest crushing of 2.5 million tonnes till date during the crushing session 25-26 at the Sameerwadi unit. This is the highest ever crushing in the history of the Company in one crushing session. The crushing session will end on 7th April, 2026.

  • Godavari Biorefineries achieves record-breaking crushing of 2.5 million tonnes in the current sugarcane crushing session 25-26
  • This is the highest ever crushing in the history of the Company in one crushing session
  • The crushing session will end on 7th April, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godavari Biorefineries Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MOTISONS] Motisons Jewellers: 82.7 Lakh Warrants Lapse Due to Non-Exercise by Certain Warrant Holders
item.description:
Motisons Jewellers Ltd. announced that 82,70,000 warrants have lapsed as certain warrant holders did not exercise their right to convert the warrants into equity shares within the stipulated period. The warrants, each convertible into one equity share of face value of Rs. 10/-, were allotted on preferential basis to allottees. The lapsed warrants were held by North Star Opportunities Fund VCC-Bull Value Incorporated VCC Sub-Fund, Eminence Global Fund PCC- Eubilia Capital Partners Fund I, and Nexpact Limited. The amount received against these warrants stands forfeited.

  • 82,70,000 warrants have lapsed due to non-exercise by warrant holders
  • Warrants were allotted to North Star Opportunities Fund VCC-Bull Value Incorporated VCC Sub-Fund, Eminence Global Fund PCC- Eubilia Capital Partners Fund I, and Nexpact Limited
  • The amount received against the lapsed warrants stands forfeited
  • This announcement comes after a stock split/sub-division that changed the face value of Equity Shares from Rs. 10/- each to Re. 1/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Motisons Jewellers Ltd | Category: Warrants Lapse

item.title: [WINDMACHIN] Windsor Machines Ltd Files Promoter Reclassification Application for Erstwhile Promoters
item.description:
Windsor Machines Ltd has filed an application for promoter reclassification of erstwhile promoters, Castle Equipments Private Limited and Ghodbunder Developers Private Limited, as public. The application was filed on 19th February 2026. This update was shared in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

  • Windsor Machines Ltd files promoter reclassification application for erstwhile promoters
  • Application filed on 19th February 2026
  • Update shared in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WINDSOR MACHINES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GUJRAFIA] Gujarat Raffia Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Gujarat Raffia Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from 01ST April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the Un-audited Standalone Financial Results of the Company for the quarter ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Un-audited Standalone Financial Results of the Company for the quarter ending on 31st March, 2026 will be intimated separately. The PAN of Designated Persons of the Company will be frozen by the Designated Depository of Company for trading in Equity Shares of the Company during the said trading window closure period. Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives are advised not to trade in securities of the Company during the period of closure of Trading Window.

  • Gujarat Raffia Industries Ltd closes trading window from 01ST April, 2026 till 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Q1 2026 results will be intimated separately
  • PAN of Designated Persons of the Company will be frozen by the Designated Depository of Company for trading during the closure period
  • Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives are advised not to trade in securities of the Company during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT RAFFIA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NMDC] NMDC Ltd Fixes New Iron Ore Prices for April 2026
item.description:
NMDC Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Securities & Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has announced the prices for Iron Ore effective from 5th April 2026. The prices for Baila Lump (65.5%, 10-40 mm) and Baila Fines (64%, -10 mm) have been fixed at ₹ 5,300/- Per Ton and ₹ 4,500/- Per Ton respectively. It's important to note that these prices are exclusive of Royalty, DMF, NMEDT, Cess, Forest Permit Fee, transit fee, GST, environmental Cess and other taxes.

  • NMDC Ltd announces new Iron Ore prices for April 2026
  • Prices for Baila Lump and Baila Fines have been fixed at ₹ 5,300/- Per Ton and ₹ 4,500/- Per Ton respectively
  • Prices are exclusive of various taxes and fees
  • Announcement made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI regulations
  • Updated prices available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NMDC LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [PANELEC] Pan Electronics India Ltd Promoter, Gullu Gellaram Talreja, Declares No Encumbrance on Shares for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
According to the disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, Gullu Gellaram Talreja, the promoter of Pan Electronics India Ltd, has declared that no encumbrance, directly or indirectly, was made on the shares held by him during the Financial Year ended on 31st March, 2026.

  • Gullu Gellaram Talreja, promoter of Pan Electronics India Ltd, has declared no encumbrance on shares for the Financial Year ended on 31st March, 2026.
  • This declaration was made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PAN ELECTRONICS INDIA LTD. | Category: Business Update
